text: l L2 – MARKET ECOSYSTEM JOURNEY Part of the Platform Innovation Kit - the toolset for the platform generation Download at www.platforminnovationkit.com Created by fastbreak.one Inspired by Ecosystemizer.com (Kawohl, Krechtling, 2018) ECOSYSTEMECOSYSTEMJOURNEY ENG EXAMPLES OF ECOSYSTEMS: § Health § Recreation § Education § Work § Entertainment § Socialization § Living § Mobility § Spirituality § Shopping § Food OR C HES T R A T OR S PR O D U C E R S EN ABL ERS HUMAN NE E D S PIK What is the primary need of the human in this ecosystem segment? What is your own platform in this segment? Who are the other key platform players in this segment? What are your own products / services you have in this segment? Who are the other key producers of products and services in this segment? What are your own enabling services you provide to the ecosystem? Who are the other key enablers in this segment? Examples: Infrastructure (Logistic, 4G/5G, network), Raw Materials, Payment Providers, etc)
